# Coinbase.Net AI Context

Coinbase.Net is a C#/.NET client for Coinbase Advanced Trade, selected Coinbase App REST endpoints, and Coinbase Exchange market data/WebSocket APIs. Use it instead of raw HTTP for Coinbase integration.

## Install

```bash
dotnet add package Coinbase.Net
```

NuGet package id: `JKorf.Coinbase.Net`.

## Core Clients

```csharp
using Coinbase.Net;
using Coinbase.Net.Clients;
using Coinbase.Net.Enums;

var restClient = new CoinbaseRestClient(options =>
{
    options.ApiCredentials = new CoinbaseCredentials("API_KEY_NAME", "EC_PRIVATE_KEY");
});

var socketClient = new CoinbaseSocketClient(options =>
{
    options.ApiCredentials = new CoinbaseCredentials("API_KEY_NAME", "EC_PRIVATE_KEY");
});
```

Public market data can use `new CoinbaseRestClient()` or `new CoinbaseSocketClient()` without credentials.

## REST Roots

- `restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.ExchangeData`
- `restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.Account`
- `restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.Trading`
- `restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.SharedClient`
- `restClient.ExchangeApi.ExchangeData`

## WebSocket Roots

- `socketClient.AdvancedTradeApi`
- `socketClient.AdvancedTradeApi.SharedClient`
- `socketClient.ExchangeApi`

## Common Calls

```csharp
var product = await restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.ExchangeData.GetSymbolAsync("ETH-USD");
var products = await restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.ExchangeData.GetSymbolsAsync(SymbolType.Spot);
var klines = await restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.ExchangeData.GetKlinesAsync("ETH-USD", KlineInterval.OneMinute);
var orderBook = await restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.ExchangeData.GetOrderBookAsync("ETH-USD", limit: 50);
var trades = await restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.ExchangeData.GetTradeHistoryAsync("ETH-USD", limit: 100);
var accounts = await restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.Account.GetAccountsAsync(limit: 100);
var orders = await restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.Trading.GetOrdersAsync(symbols: new[] { "ETH-USD" });
```

## Order Placement

```csharp
var order = await restClient.AdvancedTradeApi.Trading.PlaceOrderAsync(
    "ETH-USD",
    OrderSide.Buy,
    NewOrderType.Limit,
    quantity: 0.01m,
    price: 2000m);

if (!order.Success) { return; }
if (!order.Data.Success) { return; }
```

## Result Handling

All REST calls return `HttpResult<T>` and WebSocket calls return `WebSocketResult<T>`.

```csharp
if (!product.Success)
{
    Console.WriteLine(product.Error);
    return;
}

Console.WriteLine(product.Data.LastPrice);
```

## Rules

- Use `AdvancedTradeApi` for modern Coinbase trading and market data.
- Use `ExchangeApi` for Coinbase Exchange market data and Exchange WebSocket streams.
- Use Coinbase product ids such as `ETH-USD`, not `ETHUSDT`.
- Use ECDSA credentials: `CoinbaseCredentials(keyName, ecPrivateKey)`.
- Do not use passphrase examples.
- Check `.Success` before `.Data`.
- Check `CoinbaseOrderResult.Success` after placing orders.
- Use async/await.
- Reuse clients or use dependency injection.
- Store and unsubscribe WebSocket subscriptions.

See `CLAUDE.md`, `llms-full.txt`, `docs/ai-api-map.md`, and `Examples/ai-friendly/` for more complete guidance.
